strings.mobile.search.clearHistoryMessage: Removes recent searches and destinations stored on this device.
strings.mobile.search.noResultsMessage: No matches for '%@'. Try different keywords or open a tab from Actions.
strings.mobile.search.offlineNotice: You are offline. Recent searches are shown; new results need a connection.
strings.mobile.search.title: Search
strings.mobile.sessions.description: Ces appareils et navigateurs peuvent accéder à votre compte. Déconnectez ceux que vous ne reconnaissez pas.
strings.mobile.sessions.emptyMessage: Seul cet appareil est connecté pour le moment.
strings.mobile.sessions.loadError: Impossible de charger les sessions actives.
strings.mobile.sessions.profileHint: Voyez où vous êtes connecté et déconnectez les appareils perdus.
strings.mobile.sessions.revokeOthersError: Impossible de déconnecter les autres sessions.
strings.mobile.sessions.signOutOthersConfirm: Déconnecter toutes les autres sessions ? Les autres appareils devront se reconnecter. Cet appareil reste connecté.
strings.mobile.sessions.title: Sessions actives
strings.mobile.settings.appearance.description: Choisissez l’apparence de Lextures sur cet appareil.
strings.mobile.tutor.askAiCourseHint: Choose a course for tutoring help, or ask from your notebooks below.
strings.mobile.tutor.askAiNotebookHint: Questions without a course use your saved notebooks.
strings.mobile.tutor.budgetExceeded: You have reached your monthly AI interaction limit.
strings.mobile.tutor.disabled: AI tutor is not available for your account.
strings.mobile.tutor.disclosureBody: This feature sends your input to an AI model for processing. You can opt out anytime in account settings.
strings.mobile.tutor.noNotebooks: Save notes in a notebook first, then you can ask here.
strings.mobile.tutor.offline: AI tutor needs an internet connection.
strings.mobile.tutor.title: AI tutor
strings.mobile.uiMode.adminOverride: Your teacher set this mode for you.
strings.mobile.uiMode.description: Use a simpler layout with bigger buttons for younger learners.
strings.mobile.uiMode.title: Interface mode
strings.mobile.vibe.webOnlyHint: Some parts of this activity work best on a larger screen. Open it in your browser to use every feature.
strings.mobile.vibe.webOnlyMessage: Vibe activities are available on the web app for now.
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.predictedNotic: Risk scores are predicted from course signals — not a final determination.
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.atRisk.title: At-risk students
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.atRisk.subtitl: See who may need help and why
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.atRisk.emptyHi: When the system flags students, they will appear here.
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.severity.label: %@ (%d)
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.whatsWorking.e: Insights appear after enough class activity is recorded.
strings.mobile.instructorInsights.message.body:
Hi %@,

I noticed %@ in our course and wanted to check in. Let me know if you need help.
strings.mobile.wallet.title: Credentials wallet
strings.mobile.wallet.emptyMessage: Complete courses and activities to earn credentials, transcripts, and badges.
strings.mobile.wallet.officialTranscriptsHint: Order an official transcript through your institution's request flow.
strings.mobile.wallet.ccr.emptyAchievements: Complete courses and earn badges to build your CCR.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.accessDeniedMessag: You do not have permission to edit this course.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.sectionComingSoon: This section is available on web for now. Mobile support is coming soon.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.importExport.confi: This will erase existing modules and related content, then apply the backup. Continue?
This will add new items from the backup without removing existing content. Continue?
This will update this course from the backup and remove outline items not in the file. Continue?
strings.mobile.courseSettings.importExport.expor: Download the full course bundle as one JSON file: syllabus, modules, assignments, quizzes, grading, roster, and settings.
Backups may include student-authored content. Be careful when sharing the file.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.importExport.fileT: That backup is too large to import on this device. Use the web app instead.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.importExport.impor: Restore this course from a JSON backup produced by Lextures.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.importExport.inval: That file is not valid JSON.
Import file must contain a JSON object.
Remove all modules and related content, then apply the backup.
Keep existing content and add items whose ids are not already present.
Update this course from the backup and remove outline items not listed in the file.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.importExport.webIm: QTI, Common Cartridge, and Canvas imports are available on the web app.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.title: Title
strings.mobile.courseSettings.publishedHint: Students can access a published course.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.theme.heading: Heading color
strings.mobile.courseSettings.validation.content: Choose a content page for the course home
strings.mobile.courseSettings.hero.uploadHint: JPEG or PNG, up to 10 MB.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.hero.fileTooLarge: Image must be 10 MB or smaller.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.accessDe: Org administrators manage district blueprint courses here. Ask your platform admin for access.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.descript: Designate a master course and push structural updates to linked child courses. Teachers keep local items they add outside the blueprint copy.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.statusBl: This course is a district blueprint master.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.notBluep: Enable blueprint designation to link child courses and push structural updates.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.childLin: This course is linked to blueprint %@.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.enableDe: Turn this course into a master blueprint course.
Child courses cannot be toggled as blueprints until unlinked.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.linkedCh: Child shells must have no modules yet. Linking copies all blueprint modules and items once.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.unlinkCo: Unlink %@ from this blueprint? Copied course content is not removed.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.pushDesc: Applies blueprint changes to all linked children. Locally added items in children are preserved.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.pushConf: This will apply blueprint structural changes to all linked child courses. Continue?
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.offlineP: Connect to the internet to push blueprint updates.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.offlineM: Connect to the internet to link or unlink child courses.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.noChildr: Link at least one child course before pushing updates.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.blueprint.linkSucc: Child course linked and initial sync completed.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.archivedContent.ac: You need permission to edit course modules to view or restore archived content.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.archivedContent.de: Archived module items are hidden from students but stay in the course. Restoring an item returns it to the module outline.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.archivedContent.ge: Could not load or restore archived content.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.archivedContent.re: Restore queued — it will sync when you are back online.
Item restored to the module outline.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.toolsDesc: Turn tools on or off for everyone in this course. Disabled tools disappear from the course menu.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.disableCo: Turning off %@ hides it from the course menu until you enable it again.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.captionsD: Require captions before publishing module items that embed course videos.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.consortiu: Allow students from partner institutions with an active sharing agreement to enroll in this course.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.adap: Allow mastery-based branching between modules. Instructors configure rules on each module in the course outline.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.aiTu: Conversational AI tutor side-panel available on all course pages.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.atte: Take roll call or run self-report check-ins; optionally add sessions to the gradebook.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.cale: Month, week, and agenda views of assignment and content due dates for this course.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.coll: Real-time co-editing with shared rich-text docs and whiteboards for group work.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.sect: Split one course into multiple sections with separate rosters and optional per-section due dates.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.disc: Threaded discussion boards with replies, upvotes, graded threads, and instructor moderation.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.feed: Course-wide channels and messages, including uploads and real-time updates.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.file: Course file space where instructors and students can upload, organize, and share materials.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.live: Virtual classroom meetings — shows the Live Sessions menu item and scheduling page.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.misc: Record misconception events when tagged distractors are selected and show targeted remediation.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.mult: Show a Translate button on feed posts, discussion posts, and inbox messages.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.note: Personal notes workspace for this course.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.offi: Let instructors define availability windows and students book 1-on-1 appointment slots.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.diag: Offer a short adaptive placement assessment after enrollment.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.ques: Store quiz items in a reusable bank with optional random pools per attempt.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.repo: Author district-formatted report cards with comment banks and PDF release to the parent portal.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.hint: Let learners request progressive hints and unlock worked examples during quizzes.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.lock: Choose one-question-at-a-time or kiosk delivery on quizzes.
Let learners use the global review queue for SRS-eligible question-bank items.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.stan: Map concepts to standards codes and view per-standard coverage for this course.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.features.tool.whit: Interactive canvas for teachers to draw diagrams and save named boards.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.sections.disabledM: Turn on Course sections under the Features tab first, then return here to add sections and overrides.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.sections.listDescr: Add sections to split your course roster. Each section can have its own instructor and optional due-date overrides on assignments.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.sections.empty: No sections yet. Create one below.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.sections.overrideD: Pick a section and assignment, then set a due date that applies only to students in that section.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.sections.archiveCo: Archive %@? Students stay enrolled but the section is hidden from active lists.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.sections.sectionRo: No students in this section yet.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.sections.offlineMu: Connect to the internet to create or edit sections. Reads may show cached data.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.sections.crossList: Link teaching sections so enrollments appear together in the gradebook. Content stays on the primary section's course shell.
Only organization administrators can configure cross-list groups.
Add at least two active sections before you can cross-list them.
Students remain enrolled under their own section code. You can link the section again later.
All active sections are in this group.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.grading.scaleDescr: Choose how final grades are labeled for this course.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.grading.scale.lett: Standard A through F without plus/minus.
Includes A+, B−, and similar variants.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.grading.schemeDesc: Controls how gradebook and My Grades show scores. Stored scores stay as points.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.grading.groupsDesc: Define categories and what percent of the course grade each represents.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.grading.mappingDes: Assign each quiz, assignment, or gradable content page to an assignment group.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.grading.mappingEmp: No quizzes, assignments, or gradable content pages yet.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.grading.validation: Each assignment group needs a name.
Add at least one letter band.
Band %@ min percent must be between 0 and 100.
The lowest letter band must start at 0%.
Letter bands must have strictly increasing minimum percentages.
Pass threshold must be between 0 and 100.
Complete threshold must be between 0 and 100.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.outcomes.introDesc: Define what learners should demonstrate and connect graded work to track class-level progress.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.outcomes.emptyDesc: Start with a short, learner-facing title. Link graded work after it is saved.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.outcomes.descripti: What should learners be able to do?
strings.mobile.courseSettings.outcomes.deleteCon: This removes the outcome and every mapping to assignments or quiz items.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.outcomes.classProg: Combined average from linked graded work: %@%%
Link graded work below. Enrolled learners: %@.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.outcomes.linksDesc: Tie this outcome to a module assignment or quiz.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.outcomes.linksEmpt: No links yet — use the form below to connect evidence.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.outcomes.validatio: Pick a question for this quiz.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.gradingAgents.intr: Configure AI grading agents for assignments and quizzes. Run agents from SpeedGrader on web or mobile.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.gradingAgents.temp: Full template editing is available on web. You can start a new agent from a template below.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.gradingAgents.empt: No grading agents yet. Create one for an assignment or quiz.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.gradingAgents.noAv: Every gradable activity already has an agent.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.gradingAgents.work: Advanced workflow editing is available on web. Changes here update the agent prompt and settings.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.gradingAgents.dele: This removes the agent configuration for this activity.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.plagiarism.introDe: Configure course-wide originality scanning. Assignments can still opt out individually.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.plagiarism.enableL: Enable plagiarism and AI-authorship checks for this course
strings.mobile.courseSettings.plagiarism.thresho: Instructors are alerted when similarity meets or exceeds this percentage.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.plagiarism.privacy: When enabled, student submission text may be sent to the selected provider for analysis. Review your institution's data-sharing policy before turning this on.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.plagiarism.signalN: Similarity and AI-authorship scores are signals, not proof of misconduct.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.plagiarism.validat: Threshold must be a number between 0 and 100.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.accessibility.intr: Review image alt-text across course pages and assignments. Fix missing descriptions so content meets accessibility expectations.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.accessibility.cove: Percentage of images with descriptive alt text or marked decorative.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.accessibility.hard: Save is blocked for pages with missing alt text until images are updated.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.accessibility.empt: All images in this course have alt text or are marked decorative.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.accessibility.open: Opens alt-text editor for this item
strings.mobile.courseSettings.accessibility.link: This content type cannot be edited on mobile yet. Open the course on web to add alt text.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.accessibility.item: All images in this item now have alt text.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.accessibility.aiUn: AI alt-text suggestions are unavailable right now.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.accessibility.save: Alt text saved. Coverage will update after sync.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.title: Learner Profile
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.entry.subtitle: See how you learn and manage your profile
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.description: See what Lextures has learned about how you learn — and exactly where each insight comes from.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.error.load: Could not load your learner profile. Try again in a moment.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.howItWorks.title: How this works
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.howItWorks.body: Your learner profile is built automatically from your activity across courses. It is never entered manually, and you own it. Each insight shows where it came from, when it was last updated, and how confident we are.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.empty.title: Your profile is still building
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.empty.body: Keep learning — as you engage with courses, quizzes, and study tools, insights will appear here. We never guess before there is enough evidence.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.paused.title: Profile updates are paused
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.paused.body: Your learner profile is not being updated right now. Resume updates when you are ready, or manage your profile below.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.offline.banner: You're offline. Showing your last saved profile. Controls need a connection.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.offline.controlsDi: Connect to the internet to pause, resume, reset, or download your profile.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.manage.title: Manage your profile
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.manage.description: Download a portable copy, pause updates, or permanently reset your learner profile.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.manage.downloadHin: Exports a JSON copy of your profile
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.manage.error: That action could not be completed. Try again in a moment.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.manage.pauseConfir: Your profile will stay as it is and will not be updated from new activity until you resume.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.manage.resumeConfi: Lextures will start updating your profile again from your learning activity.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.manage.resetConfir: This permanently deletes all profile insights and evidence. It cannot be undone.
When and how consistently you study.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.facet.contentModal: The content formats and pacing that fit you best.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.facet.strengthsGro: Concepts you have mastered and areas to develop.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.facet.interests.de: Topics and subjects you engage with most.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.facet.learningAppr: How you persist, seek help, and consolidate learning.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.facet.insufficient: Not enough data yet for this section.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.facet.error: This section could not be loaded. Other sections are still available.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.insight.modalityAf: How you engage with each format
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.insight.contentPac: How thoroughly you work through content
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.insight.genericUnk: Insight details are not available yet.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.insight.peakUnknow: Your peak study window is still emerging.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.insight.peak: You study most on %@ around %@ (%d%% of activity).
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.insight.consistenc: Consistency score %d%% with about %@ active days per week.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.insight.streak: Current streak %d days; longest streak %d days.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.insight.session: Typical session about %d minutes; %@ sessions per active week.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.insight.modalityTo: You engage most with %@ content (%d%% affinity).
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.insight.pacing: You tend to work through content at a %@ pace.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.insight.helpSeekin: Help-seeking style: %@; about %@ hints per attempt.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.evidence.empty: No detailed evidence is available for this insight.
strings.mobile.learnerProfile.chart.rhythmCaptio: Study activity by day and hour
strings.mobile.introCourse.card.title: Bienvenue sur Lextures
strings.mobile.introCourse.card.subtitle: Une visite guidée de la navigation, des activités d'apprentissage et de l'aide disponible.
strings.mobile.introCourse.celebration.title: Vous avez terminé Bienvenue sur Lextures !
strings.mobile.introCourse.celebration.body: Bravo — vous êtes prêt à commencer vos vrais cours.
strings.mobile.introCourse.celebration.bodyWithC: Votre certificat d'introduction est prêt à être consulté et partagé.
strings.mobile.introCourse.rail.title: Votre progression d'introduction
strings.mobile.introCourse.offline.cached: Affichage de la progression d'introduction en cache
strings.mobile.courseSettings.translations.intro: Ajoutez des variantes de langue, gérez le glossaire et consultez la couverture. La rédaction complète des segments reste sur le web.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.translations.empty: Ajoutez une langue cible pour suivre la couverture et le glossaire.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.translations.addLo: Creating a locale may trigger machine-translation jobs when you publish content. Coverage starts at 0% until items are published.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.translations.local: Coverage is read-only. Edit glossary terms below. Segment translation authoring is available on web.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.translations.items: Status is read-only on mobile. Publish drafts from the web translations editor.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.translations.gloss: No glossary terms yet. Add key phrases so translations stay consistent.
Source language is English. Saving replaces the target for the same source term.
strings.mobile.integrations.title: Integrations
strings.mobile.integrations.entry.subtitle: API keys, calendar feeds, and MCP
strings.mobile.integrations.description: Manage credentials and feeds that connect Lextures to other apps and AI agents.
strings.mobile.integrations.accessKeys.title: Access keys
strings.mobile.integrations.accessKeys.descripti: Long-lived credentials for API tools and MCP agents.
strings.mobile.integrations.accessKeys.label: Label
strings.mobile.integrations.secret.title: Copy your key now
strings.mobile.integrations.secret.warning: You won't see this again. Store it somewhere safe.
strings.mobile.integrations.calendar.title: Calendar subscriptions
strings.mobile.integrations.calendar.description: Subscribe to deadlines in Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook.
strings.mobile.integrations.calendar.regenerateM: The old link will stop working immediately.
strings.mobile.integrations.calendar.activeHint: You have an active subscription URL. Regenerate to view and copy the link.
strings.mobile.integrations.calendar.emptyHint: Generate a URL to subscribe in your calendar app.
strings.mobile.integrations.calendar.privacyWarn: Anyone with your feed URL can see assignment titles and due dates. Do not share it publicly.
strings.mobile.integrations.mcp.title: MCP for AI agents
strings.mobile.integrations.mcp.description: Connect Cursor, Claude Desktop, or other MCP clients using an access key with the mcp:connect scope.
strings.mobile.integrations.serviceTokens.title: Service tokens
strings.mobile.integrations.serviceTokens.descri: Org-scoped credentials for SIS sync, webhooks, and institutional automation.
strings.mobile.feedback.entrySubtitle: Tell us what's on your mind
strings.mobile.feedback.title: Share feedback
strings.mobile.feedback.privacy: We read every note; we may not reply individually. Your message is shared with Lextures staff.
strings.mobile.feedback.message.label: Your message
strings.mobile.feedback.message.placeholder: Tell us what's on your mind — a bug, idea, or anything else…
strings.mobile.feedback.category.label: Category (optional)
strings.mobile.feedback.category.question: Question
strings.mobile.feedback.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
strings.mobile.feedback.rateLimited: You're sending feedback too quickly. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
strings.mobile.feedback.offline: You're offline — try again when you're back online.
strings.mobile.admin.archivedCourses.title: Archived courses
strings.mobile.admin.archivedCourses.entry.subti: Restore or permanently delete archived courses
strings.mobile.admin.archivedCourses.description: Archived courses are hidden from catalogs and search. Restore a course to bring it back, or permanently delete it to remove all content, files, submissions, and enrollments.
strings.mobile.admin.archivedCourses.emptyMessag: No archived courses in this organization.
strings.mobile.admin.archivedCourses.emptySearch: No archived courses match your search.
strings.mobile.admin.archivedCourses.restoreConf: Restore this course to the catalog?
strings.mobile.admin.archivedCourses.deleteWarni: This removes all modules, assignments, quizzes, submissions, grades, enrollments, uploaded files, and related data. This cannot be undone.
strings.mobile.admin.archivedCourses.accessDenie: You need the rbac:manage permission to review archived courses.
strings.mobile.admin.roles.title: Roles & permissions
strings.mobile.admin.roles.entry.subtitle: Review roles and assign them to users
strings.mobile.admin.roles.description: Review which permissions each role includes. Assign roles to users when needed — create or edit permission strings on the web.
strings.mobile.admin.roles.accessDeniedMessage: You need the rbac:manage permission to manage roles.
strings.mobile.admin.roles.webHint: Create permission strings and edit the full matrix on a larger screen.
strings.mobile.admin.roles.selfElevationBlocked: You cannot assign yourself a role that grants admin access from mobile.
strings.mobile.admin.roles.noMembers: No users have this role yet.
strings.mobile.createCourse.title: New course
strings.mobile.createCourse.field.title: Title
strings.mobile.createCourse.mode.traditionalHint: Modules, assignments, and quizzes in a fixed structure.
strings.mobile.createCourse.mode.competencyHint: Organized around outcomes and assessments. Add competencies on the course page after creation.
strings.mobile.createCourse.syllabus.intro: Choose a starter syllabus template or start blank.
strings.mobile.createCourse.template.blankSummar: No syllabus sections — write your own later in course settings.
strings.mobile.createCourse.template.k12.name: K–12
strings.mobile.createCourse.template.k12.summary: Term dates, grading categories, expectations, and contact — tuned for secondary classes.
strings.mobile.createCourse.template.higherEd.su: Learning outcomes, weekly rhythm, texts, assessment, and campus policies in one place.
strings.mobile.createCourse.template.selfPaced.s: Goals, pacing, milestones, and how learners get unstuck without fixed meeting times.
strings.mobile.createCourse.template.bootcamp.su: Daily flow, projects, tools, and conduct for short high-intensity programs.
Welcome new hires or members: role expectations, resources, and first-week checklist.
strings.mobile.createCourse.firstModule.label: First module title
strings.mobile.createCourse.firstModule.hint: Optional — you can skip and add modules later.
strings.mobile.createCourse.error.createFailed: Could not create the course. Try again.
strings.mobile.createCourse.error.syllabusFailed: Could not apply the syllabus template. Try again.
strings.mobile.createCourse.error.moduleFailed: Could not finish setup. Try again.
strings.mobile.createCourse.cancel.message: The course was already created and will stay in your Courses list.
strings.mobile.createCourse.competency.handoffBo: Your competency-based course is ready. Open it to add competencies, outcomes, and assessments.
strings.mobile.marketplace.title: Marketplace
strings.mobile.marketplace.prompt: Parcourez les cours disponibles à l’inscription.
strings.mobile.marketplace.emptyMessage: Essayez une autre recherche ou un autre filtre.
strings.mobile.marketplace.claimError: Impossible de s’inscrire à ce cours.
strings.mobile.marketplace.paidWebHint: Les cours payants s’achètent sur le web pour respecter App Store et Play.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.marketplace.title: Marketplace
strings.mobile.courseSettings.marketplace.descri: Listez ce cours sur la marketplace et définissez un tarif. Laissez vide pour Gratuit.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.marketplace.listHe: Les apprenants peuvent le découvrir et s’inscrire lorsque c’est activé.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.marketplace.publis: Publiez le cours avant de le lister sur la marketplace.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.marketplace.loadEr: Impossible de charger les paramètres marketplace.
strings.mobile.courseSettings.marketplace.amount: Saisissez un montant valide avec au plus deux décimales.
Les cours payants doivent coûter au moins 0.50.
Le prix dépasse le maximum autorisé.

mobile.admin.people.title: People
mobile.admin.people.entry.subtitle: Search, invite, and manage user accounts
mobile.admin.people.description: Search users by name or email. Invite new users, suspend compromised accounts, and review roles from your phone.
mobile.admin.people.emptyMessage: Enter a name or email above to search for users.
mobile.admin.people.accessDeniedMessage: You need the rbac:manage permission to manage people.
mobile.admin.people.webHint: Bulk import, delete accounts, and full people dashboard on a larger screen.
mobile.admin.people.resendInviteConfirm: Resend setup email to this user?
mobile.admin.people.selfSuspendBlocked: You cannot suspend your own account.
